welcome.title: Welcome to Radzi
welcome.tagline: Track your walks and rides. Every journey counts.

profile.title: Set Up Your Profile
profile.photoPermissionBody: Photo library access was denied. You can continue without a profile photo.

fgLocation.title: Know where you are
fgLocation.body: Used to show your position on the map while you ride or walk. Without it, the map won't follow you.

bgLocation.title: Auto-track your trips
bgLocation.body: Lets Radzi record your route even when the screen is off. Without this, you'll need to start tracking manually every time.

motion.title: Detect when you move
motion.body: Uses your phone's motion sensors to start recording when you begin walking or cycling. Without it, automatic trip detection won't work.

notifications.title: Stay in the loop
notifications.body: Radzi notifies you when a trip is being recorded in the background. You can always check trip status in the app.

allSet.title: You're all set!
allSet.body: Ready to start your first activity?

banner.permissionMissing: Some permissions are missing. Tap to review.

permissionsScreen.title: App Permissions
permissionsScreen.subtitle: Radzi needs these permissions to track your activities automatically.

locationFg.name: Location
locationFg.description: Required to show your position on the map and track your routes.

locationBg.name: Background Location
locationBg.description: Required to auto-record trips when the screen is off. Select "Always" in Settings.

motion.name: Motion & Activity
motion.description: Required to automatically detect when you start walking or cycling.

notifications.name: Notifications
notifications.description: Notifies you when a trip is being recorded in the background.

locationForeground.title: Location access needed
locationForeground.subtitle: Required to track trips and use the map

locationPrompt.title: Location Access Needed
locationPrompt.description: Radzi needs access to your location to show your position on the map and track your rides.
